feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: sales document type 'LKJ'
entry.content:
I want to use sales document type'LKJ' in scope '55F', but it is not defined.

Please tell me the solution to use LKJ.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: DDA tool access is rejected
entry.content:
Hi Team.

I am trying to access DDA tool with my registered S-User ID. and i get to a point to click on the link to access the tool. But, i land up on the page saying 'Your request is rejected. In case you disagree, reach out via email.' Any idea what the reason could be the possible reasons? my other colleagues are able to access.

entry.title: C_MATERIALSTOCKACTUAL can not be opened in "Custom Querys". Error states CDS entity cannot be used.
entry.content:
Within SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud C_MATERIALSTOCKACTUAL cannot be opened.

Why? It is released and all other Query can be opened. I can rebuild it since I know the Cube, but it should work, otherwise I dont need standard queries

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud API for reading customer open item data
entry.content:
Dear Colleagues, 

Im trying to find the correct API for reading customer open item data. 
The use case is as follows:
An external system is sending custom open item data to the SAP public cloud system and SAP PC is managing the open items. The external system needs to get the status of the customer open items from SAP. I assume a standard read API is available in SAP public cloud, but I do not want to use FI-CA if possibe and I cannot find the correct API to use. 

The following APIs do not seem to be availabe for public cloud?

Customer Invoice - Read | SAP Help Portal

Customer Open Item | SAP Help Portal

Please help me find the correct documentation / API to read customer open item data in SAP public cloud, that can be triggerd from an external system.

KR
Andreas Winter

entry.title: I am trying to send auto email to vendor when goods receipt has been posted.Unable to map this
entry.content:
Our company requirement is to Send auto email to the Vendor when we do the Goods receipt.

Unable to configure 

Thanks in advance

Senthil

entry.title: Missing functionality in SAP note : 955860 - Invoice correction process with return movement (PL&HU)
entry.content:
Hello, 

The SAP Note 955860 cannot be applied in the public cloud environment, as it requires the creation of a new sales document type (RERK), which is not supported.

We are implementing a Public Cloud solution for a company operating in Poland, and therefore this legal requirement must be addressed. Could you provide alternative solutions or recommendations ? 

Thank you in advance,

Regards, 

Eva

entry.title: Change status and content of standard field 'Purchase requisition description'
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

currently, the "Purchase Requisition Description" field is automatically prefilled with the requestor’s name and the PR request date.
We would like to make this field mandatory (with red asterisk, same as field document type), and also blank by default, so the requisitioner is forced to write more detailed description.

We have checked custom logics for:
- changing field status ( MM_PUR_S4_PR_FLDCNTRL_SIMPLE) but description field is not available in the interface of this logic, 
- changing content of the field to be blank (MM_PUR_S4_PR_MODIFY_ITEM), but also, field is not available in the interface (PR does not have a header line, so I checked this badi).

Is it even possible to change status and content of Purchase Requisition description field? 

My question is related to app Manage purchase requisition - professional (F2229) for public cloud.

Thank you very much for all your help
Veronika

entry.title: Generate intercompany billing request based on the results of running allocation cycles (S4H Public)
entry.content:
We have a scenario where the parent company incurs shared costs (e.g., IT, HR, facility expenses) and allocates them to a subsidiary using intercompany cost allocation cycles (app Manage allocation cycles).

  • There is no time reporting, no activity types, and no end user reporting hours.
  • Only IC cost allocations are done via allocation cycles Manage Allocation cycles app  (e.g., from one cost center to another across company codes).
  • We need to generate an intercompany invoice (Intercompany billing request) based on these allocations.
  • We need to add also margin to such intercompany invoices
  • We need to reallocate also Revenues

We understand that there is only one solution to activate 4AN, 4AU, 16T scope items that relates to professional services industry to generate the intercompany billing request based on intercompany allocation cycles

  1. How can we add a margin to the intercompany invoice if we do not have activity types?
  2. To reallocate revenue cross-company is a very specific scenario. Is there a way to handle this within the standard Reassign Cost/Revenues process, or any other standard approach in SAP S/4HANA Cloud? Will the Intercompany Billing Request (ICBR) consider the amount of revenue reassigned between company codes? 

  3. If SAP does not support this process in Public Cloud, what is the recommended approach to achieve this?

We appreciate any clear guidance based on actual system behavior.

Thank you!

entry.title: Outbound delivery creation on STO with TM relevant purchasing group before creating Freight Order
entry.content:
Hi,
I am trying to create an outbound delivery on STO with TM enabled purchasing group in public cloud. When using the TM enabled purchasing group, the PO does not appear on VL10B to create outbound. When other purchasing group is used (which is not relevant to TM) then it does appear in VL10B. 

The business scenario requires creation of delivery before creation of freight order in TM. Is there any way to create delivery on STO before Freight Order creation?

entry.title: Possibility to check if there is an attachment in a PO using I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 CDS
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is there a possibility of extending I_PurchaseOrderAPI01 CDS view in SAP public cloud by adding a field that gives us the information of whether a PO contains an attachment or not ?

Thanks & Regards,

Ahmed.

entry.title: EWM-warehouse order - PICK LIST Config for custom form template in private cloud
entry.content:
Hi folks,

Is there any business rule existing for EWM - PICK LIST in OPD transaction in private cloud . We also checked the BRF+ xml file provided by SAP in note 2248229 but there is no xml file specific to warehouse order.

we are struggling to config the forms created in Maintain Form Templates app for pick list.

this pick list is generated when we are creating a warehouse order.

is there any other way to config the forms other than OPD transaction and if we need to use OPD then what is the respective BRF+ xml file for that?

 

please help.

thanks

entry.title: [S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition] Migrating from Third-Party CMIS Repo to SAP Default DMS Repo #ACCL0
entry.content:
Hi everyone

In a given scenario with an External CMIS repository (Open Text), enabled by BTP DMS interface, is there a documentation describing if and how the external CMIS (Customer Managed) can be migrated into the SAP Default one (BTP DMS Repository, SAP Managed), which is the standard deployment option for S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition?

I found the following materials, but not sure which of the two is the right one. Any additional reference/guide, is highly appreciated.

Migrating from Third-Party CMIS Repository | SAP Help Portal

Migrating Third-Party CMIS Repository to SAP Document Management Service | SAP Help Portal

 

Thank you

Cristian

entry.title: GR Print Preview in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello gurus,

Is it possible to check the print preview before or right after conducting a Goods Receipt using the "Post Good Receipt for Purchasing Document" APP?

Thank you.

entry.title: Automatic Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document
entry.content:
Hi All,

Below is the current process for Automatic Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document

  1. When creating a purchase order, set the Supplier Confirmation Control in the item to "Inbound Delivery."
  2. After the purchase order is approved, go to  "Schedule Inbound Delivery Creation" app, set the parameter "Delivery End Date" = "Delivery Date in the Purchase Order of Schedule Lines ".
  3. Once the scheduling is complete, an inbound delivery number will be generated. Then, go to the "Change Inbound Delivery" app and enter the goods receipt quantity.
  4. Complete the goods receipt in the "Schedule Goods Receipt for Inbound Deliveries" app.

Would there be a more automated approach?Is it possible to skip step 3 and have the goods receipt automatically completed via scheduling as soon as the purchase order is approved?

Or is there any misconfiguration on my end that needs to be adjusted?

Thanks for your help! Looking forward to your guidance.

Raina

entry.title: [Question] How to Copy a Company Code in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
entry.content:
Hello,
I am using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and I would like to copy an existing company code to create a new one.

In the on-premise version, I found that transaction OBY2 can be used to copy a company code. However, I do not see a similar function in the Public Edition.

Questions

  1. Is there a way to copy a company code in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?
  2. If copying is not possible, what is the most efficient method to create a new company code?
    • Setting up via Central Business Configuration (CBC)
    • Efficiently migrating relevant master data (e.g., plants, purchasing organizations)

Environment Information

  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

I would appreciate any best practices or official SAP documentation on how to create or copy a company code in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: How to see the name of creator of journal in Manage Supplier Line Item
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have the requirement to see the user name or the creator of journal entry in the app Manage Supplier Line item. Because the current situation is only showing the User ID not the name of the user. 

Any Suggestion to do?

Thankyou!

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Displa G/l account balance - summary/journal entry view APP export report is text
entry.content: Display G/L account balance - summary/journal entry view APP export report is text, SAP can be changed to numbers? Can improve financial work efficiency.

entry.title: Project Control - Currency
entry.content:
Hi, 

We're in a implementation project with S4 Public cloud. Our customer is going to use Project Control - enterprise projects for theire investment projects. However we've two question that we don't really understand. 

When creating the project there is a possibility of choosing the project currency, if we don't choose the currency is seems like the system is choosing the company code currency is that correct? 

But, the strange thing we've encounted is that when entering app "Project Brief" it seems like the results in the chart is displayed in the global currency and not the project currency? Can we change this somewhere? Is this how the system should behave? 

Please see example below: 

 


Kind Regards, Sanne

entry.title: What does "_bustT" in the field component Name of a custom field refer to?
entry.content:
I defined a Custom Field to add items to the BP master.
The created item (published) has not yet been added to the screen.
　Field Type：Code List(1)
　Identifier：YY1_C_COLL_MON_240
　Business Context：Master Data: Business Partner(BP_CUSTVEND1)

On another occasion, I used the API (A_BusinessPartner) to get data, and noticed that "_ bus" was added to the end of the component name of Custom Field.
In the app, the Custom Field has a Field Component Name of "_ bus" or "_ busT".

 


I assume these are retrieved via the API, but there is also a "_ busF" result from the API.
The items in the red frame in the image below.

 

If anyone knows what the "_ bus" at the end of these refers to (especially _busT and _busF) and what purpose it is given for?
Also, is there anything to be granted other than "_ xxT" and "_ xxF"?

entry.title: Azure Synapse SAP connectors available for public cloud
entry.content:
Dear technical experts,

We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and want to connect our system to our AZURE Synapse product.  We know that there are a number of standard connectors in Synapse to do this but unsure which standard connectors will be appropriate / useable with Public Cloud.  We believe that the SAP CDC connector would best suit our purposes but what we have seen in various documentation are references to Private Cloud.  Hence our question.

Cheers

Jay
